violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Packages of raw beef thawing in standing water. Thaw under running water.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers have food build up and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving and drawer cooler counter have food/debris/grease build up and need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors are sticky and have food/debris build up and need cleaning.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Pizza oven not located under hood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in coolers/freezers need cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood over grill & fryers needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors/walls need cleaning in kitchen.
